name: Ann Fowler's Toffee Crunch Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Sara Lee Pound Cake, frozen
3 1/4 oz. chocolate-covered toffee candy bars, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pound cake horizontally into three equal-sized layers; set aside.
2. In a chilled large deep bowl, beat the cream with chilled beaters until stiff peaks form. Gradually add the butterscotch syrup, folding gently.
3. Place the first cake layer on a serving plate. Frost generously with whipped cream mixture. Sprinkle layer with one-third of the candy bars. Arrange the second layer and repeat the process. Top with the third layer and frost the top and sides of the cake with the remaining whipped cream. Drizzle more butterscotch syrup over the cake, and top with the remaining candy bars.
4. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 3 hours before serving.
(Variation: Use strawberry or chocolate syrup in place of butterscotch and garnish with chopped frozen strawberries or semi-sweet chocolate chips)
